title: Antimima dekenahi
taxonomy: Antimima dekenahi is a species of plant in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Antimima, which is a group of succulent plants native to South Africa. Antimima dekenahi is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within its genus. The classification of Antimima dekenahi is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its succulent leaves and stem. This classification helps to distinguish it from other species within the Aizoaceae family.
